ogTitle: Kawl Kawl vs Kawungan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kawl Kawl and Kawungan.
heading: Kawl Kawl vs Kawungan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kawl Kawl, Queensland and Kawungan, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kawungan has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Kawl Kawl (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kawl Kawl or Kawungan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kawl Kawl has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Kawungan scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kawl Kawl scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Kawungan scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kawl Kawl or Kawungan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kawungan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
